title: SoundScape — Urban Sound Architecture of Central Istanbul
author: ılgın altun
course: ITU MBL549E Special Topics in Architectural Design Computing, 2026
research_question: Can spatial morphology be perceived and understood through sound without visual reference? What acoustic narratives emerge when six-dimensional urban morphological data is mapped to generative synthesis? What does sonification reveal about spatial transformation that visualization obscures—and what does it lose?

routes.name: Kadıköy–Moda Coastline
routes.key_feature: Dramatic shift from built to green

routes.name: Taksim–Taşkışla Central Corridor
routes.key_feature: High pedestrian presence persists; vehicles vanish

data_collection.spatial_split: Left/right building ratio computed by halving the frame horizontally

audio_synthesis.building_left: Sine oscillator, panned L, pitches D1–D2 by density
audio_synthesis.building_right: Sine oscillator, panned R, pitches D1–D2 by density
audio_synthesis.sky_ratio: Triangle oscillator, centred, pitches A4–A5; octave partial added at sky > 0.35
audio_synthesis.vegetation_ratio: Triangle oscillator, slight L pan, pitches F3–A3
audio_synthesis.person_count: Percussive sine drop (D2→D1), alternating L/R, up to 4 hits at 68 ms intervals

files.dataset.pkl: Cleaned dataset as pandas DataFrame (31 rows × 11 columns)
files.dataset.csv: Same dataset in CSV format for convenience
files.dataDictionary.json: Per-column definitions, types, domains, and notes
files.metadata.json: Dataset provenance, scope, method, and application details (this file)
files.README_TAKSIM_TASKISLA.md: Full project documentation for Taksim–Taşkışla route

research_questions_specific.encoding: How do we map six-dimensional morphological data (building mass, sky openness, vegetation, pedestrian density, vehicle density) to a perceptually coherent and navigable soundscape?
research_questions_specific.legibility: Can a listener track their movement through an urban sequence by ear alone, identifying key moments and zones from the acoustic signature?
research_questions_specific.revelation: What patterns in spatial data become audible through sonification that remain hidden in numerical tables or statistical plots?
research_questions_specific.loss: What critical information—materiality, social dynamics, phenomenological richness—cannot be captured by morphological measurement and therefore cannot be sonified?

methodology: Two routes, one sonification engine. Identical audio synthesis rules applied to distinct urban typologies (coastal transition + commercial-to-cultural gradient) to test whether sonification reveals universal spatial patterns or is site-specific.
